claim: Verification confirms that explorer and cross-checker evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness for the boundary audit implementation claims. All project facts are backed by project-scoped evidence with concrete file paths and line ranges. No assumptions are presented as facts. The identified missing evidence (stress test execution results) is correctly reflected in missing arrays and does not invalidate the verified implementation claims.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker both independently verified SHA256 digest implementation and snapshot building logic at identical file locations.
evidence.why: Confirms evidence paths are usable and claims are independently reproducible.

evidence.summary: Both agents verified post-execution boundary audit generates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers.
evidence.why: Verifies the core PRD readiness blocking mechanism is implemented as claimed.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker independently verified evidence validation logic at different line ranges than explorer.
evidence.why: Shows independent verification with separate code reads confirming same claims.

evidence.summary: Both agents verified comprehensive test coverage for boundary mutation detection across git and non-git scenarios.
evidence.why: Confirms test evidence is correctly cited and supports the implementation claims.

evidence.summary: Both agents independently verified dirty working tree with 55+ modified files.
evidence.why: Verifies project state claims are backed by reproducible evidence.

evidence.summary: Both agents verified stress test tool exists with scenario matching current demand claims.
evidence.why: Confirms stress test tool availability is a fact, not an assumption.

evidence.summary: Verfier protocol specifies 'Do not ask permission to write the evidence result. Do not write the result file yourself; the harness captures stdout and writes artifacts.'
evidence.why: Confirms verifier should output JSON to stdout, not write files.

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker evidence is valid and sufficient. All project claims cite project-scoped evidence with concrete paths. No assumptions presented as facts. Missing stress test execution results are correctly identified in missing arrays and do not invalidate the verified implementation. Evidence agreement shows no conflicts. Ready to unblock EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED for verifier role.
